channel.title: Essentials on KRI
channel.description: Recent content in Essentials on KRI

item.title: Quarantine Survival Guide
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: It’s time to hunker down due to the Stay-at-Home orders and social distancing currently in place so that we all do our part to help reduce the number of COVID-19 cases in the United States. When the virus reaches your community, we all must follow the Center for Disease Control’s (CDC) sanitation guidelines to prevent more people from dying from this disease. The CDCl is the authority on how to sanitize your household.

item.title: How to Add Modern Style to the Kitchen
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Remodeling a somewhat dated kitchen with a new style keeps the magic going, right? Adding a more modern touch to your kitchen can reinvigorate your family gathering area and even you! Take charge and with a few simple changes you can refresh your kitchen, and catch up with the most recent trends in home design. Consider including the following modern kitchen style trends to your home: Aesthetic Style Contemporary kitchens feature minimalist design with monochromatic colors and elements that are flush against walls and countertops.

item.title: 5 Essential Blogs
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: As the freeze begins to thaw the frozen tundra we call winter, now has never been a more opportune time to start a remodeling project. Spring is coming soon and the days are growing longer, if you have kids during the springtime, you can muster a small army of volunteers over the weekend to help you out. Millions of people across the world take the opportunity to begin organizing and decluttering from their hibernate states as the snow begins to melt.

item.title: 3 Practical Digital Tools
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Seeing is believing. Until you see a product in your home, you won’t know for sure if it’s a good fit. Internet retailers have gotten really good at providing product photos, dimensions and more to show the customer exactly what they’re getting, but it’s still challenging for them to envision what the product will look like once it’s in their home. That’s why Houzz fortified its app with new digital tools to get homeowners as close to seeing a product in their own home as possible.

item.title: Pet Friendly Flooring
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: For those of us who chose to adopt a friendly canine companion, whether it’s a new puppy or an older dog, perhaps even a rescue. This new chapter will be marked with responsibilities as you share your home with a clawed animal. They’re going to be running around all over the place. Let’s not even discuss the mess you’re going to be constantly cleaning. As a homeowner, you’re never not cleaning up thanks to them.

item.title: Is Laminate Waterproof?
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Chris Selvais)
item.description: Flooring is very very important and when winter rolls around, homeowners ought to be concerned about spills and even the occasional leak. Naturally, waterproof options are the most durable choice. The big question on everyone’s mind is… “Can laminate be waterproof?” To be honest - ‘cause that’s our job - the answer is no. Laminate tile is not waterproof, however widely believed that may be. The Flooring Girl, a flooring expert, believes that this misperception is due to the fact that many customers mistakenly confuse vinyl with laminate flooring(Debbie.
